titleStmt.title: SII 28.122: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 122. (A.R. No. 277 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, south wall.

Records the royal order setting up of an agaram (brahmin quarter) named Vikkirama Pāṇḍiya-chcharupēdimaṅgalam after the name of (his) nāyaṉār (father ?), for 108 chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭas with a temple in its centre, the deity wherein was also named Vikrama-Pāṇḍīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyaṉār, including a Sarasvati-bhaṇḍāram and provision of residences for the attendants, all the land involved amounting to about 8000 kuḻi or 4 vēli to the west of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr, a taṉiyūr in Irājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu. The bhaṭṭas were given the privilege of using a particular tank for their performence of sandhyāvandanam. To the east of that tank the land was to be ambai-kkūḍam (?) and grazing ground. Whereas the above grant of land was for the setting of the residences (nattam) of the 108 bhaṭṭas and the said attendents and as site for the temple and Sarasvatī-bhaṇḍāra, for their maintenace a total of 147(3/4) vēli in Irājaśikhāmaṇi-nallūr alias Puḷiyaṅguḍi, a tiṟappu (land brought under the general revenue system from erstwhile states as privileged tenures) land in the western bank of Ponnēri in Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr after excepting the land being enjoyed by several others (listed) was granted in 147(3/4) shares, 108 shares to the bhaṭṭas, 30 to the Nāyaṉār (the deity in the temple stated above) and the rest for stated purposes and to maintain the necessary village functionaries (grāmaparikaram). The charter contains many interesting and enlightening details. (Also see A.R. Ep., 1914 part II, p. 92.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ cuntara pāṇṭiya devar Irājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr melpāl nāyaṉār perāl nām vaitta Akaram vikkirama pāṇṭiyaccaruppeti maṅkalattu vedamum śāstramum poyu vyākhyātākakaḷāy Irukkum caturvedi bhaṭṭakaḷ Akaramiṭa paṭṭarkaḷ per nūṟṟu Eṭṭukkum Ivvakarattu naṭuveḻuntaruḷuvitta vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkum grāmā māṉkaḷukkum sarasvatipaṇṭārattārkkum paṇimakkaḷukkum nattamāka coḷentrasiṁha vāykkālāṉa nilaiyeḻu kopurap perunteruvil teṉciṟakil tirurvaṇukkaṉ mulapuruṣaiyār maṉaivāṉiḷamuṭpaṭa Eḻukol nikki Itaṉ terkkum kūliccevaka
ppiḷḷaiyār koyilukku vaṭakkum tirumeykāppār teruvil mel ciṟakil Eṭupparicaṟutikku meṟkku Eḻupatiṉ kolnaṟaiyuḻa Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum Iṉṉāṉkellai Uḷppaṭṭa Irāmakuṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Udeśam kuḻi Eṇṇāyirattāl nilam nālveliyum Itil Uḷpaṭṭa palavṛkṣaṅkaḷum māvukaḷum kiṇaṟukaḷum vaḻikaḷum Oḻukkaikaḷum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭ[ ṭa sa] masta prāptikaḷum Uḷppaṭa paṇṭu Uṭaiyāraiyum paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷaraiyum tavirntu Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tiruviruppum taṅkaḷukku nattamumākak koḷḷavum sandhyāvandanam paṇṇakkā kuḷattile peṟa muṉpu pokiṟa vaḻiye poy Ikkuḷattil sandhyāvandanādikaḷ paṇṇippokavum Itaṉ kiḻkaraiyil Ampaikkūṭam gopra
jārabhūmiyākavum Akarappaṭṭarkaḷ per nūṟṟu Eṭṭukkum vedavṛttippaṅku muṉṟum sūtravṛttip paṅku Oṉṟum vaidyar per Iraṇṭukkum per Oṉṟukkup paṅku mukkāle Araikkālākap paṅku Oṉṟe mukkālum Ampaṭṭar paṅku Araiyum Ūrkaṇakkaṉ paṅku Araiyum Uvaccaṉ paṅkukālum kucavaṉ paṅku kālum kollaṉ paṅku kālum marattaccaṉ paṅku Araiyum taṭṭāṉ paṅku kālum Īraṅkolli paṅku kāle Araikkālum nāvitaṉ paṅku kāle Araikkālum vaṇṇāṉ paṅku kālum pāṭikāppāṉ paṅku kāle Araikkālum veṭṭiyāṉ paṅku Araikkālum Ākappaṅku nūṟṟu Orupatteḻe mukkālum nāyaṉārkkup paṅku muppatum Ākap paṅku nūṟṟu nāṟpatteḻe
mukkālukku Iṉṉāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūril poṉṉeri melkaraiyil tiṟappu Irājacikāmaṇi nallūrāṉa puḷiyaṅkuṭi tiruppuṟa nattam pottakappaṭi variyilār Iṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭi nilam Irunūṟṟu Oru pattiraṇṭairaiyil Ūrnattamum tirukkoyilkaḷum tirumaṭaiviḷākaṅkaḷum nirnilaikaḷum Oṭaikaḷum payiṟ ceyya Oṇṇāp pāḻ nilam muppattoṉṟe yeḻu mākkāṇiyum Ivvūril Uṭaiyār rājarājiśvara muṭaiyārum civalokamuṭaiyārkkum devadāṉa nilam Āṟeyeḻu mā mukkāṇiRead mukkāṇiAraikkāṇiyum veḷḷāṉ kāṇiyāḷarkkuk kāṇiyāy Ivarkaḷ kāṇiyil paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu varaiyum payiṟ ceyya Aṭaitta nilam pattoṉpatiṟṟu veliyuṭpaṭa niṟuttiṉa nilam Iru
patteḻu veliyum Āka niṅkal nilam Aṟupattu nāle mukkāl nīkki (nīkki) nilam nūṟṟu nāṟpatteḻe mukkālil Iṉṉāyaṉārkku pūjaikkum tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷukkum Uṭalākat tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nīkki viṭṭa nilam muppatiṟṟu veliyum nikki gṛāmattukkum gṛāma parikaraṅkaḷukkum nilam nūṟṟu Orupatteḻe mukkālum mutaṟkuttale peṟavum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ kārum maṟuvum kaṭaippūvum puṉpayirum vampum kamukum koṭiyum karumpum Orupūvum ceṅkaḻunirum Uḷpaṭat tāṅkaḷ veṇṭu payiṟ ceytu koḷḷavum nilaṅkaḷum nila viḻukkāṭo pāti nīṅkalkaḷum Ūrnattaṅkaḷil tiruppuṟa nattattil mukkūṟu veḷḷāṉ kāṇiyāḷarkkuk kuṭiyiruppākavum nikki niṉṟa Orukūṟum Orupuṟampaṭaiya nikki koḷḷa
vum Ituvum nikki niṉṟa nattaṅkaḷum Itil Uḷpaṭṭa palavṛkṣaṅkaḷum kollaikaḷ kuḷaṅkaḷ Oṭaikaḷum goprajārabhūmikaḷ Orukāl payiṟ ceyya Oṇṇāp pāḻkaḷum ceyttalaikkuṟaikaḷum Uḻikaḷum Iṉṉila viḻukkāṭṭile peṟavum Itil nilaṅkaḷukku muṟkālaṅkaḷil nirppāyntu potum viranārāyaṇac caturvedi maṅkalattu śrīparāntakapereriyāṉa vaṭakkil Ēriyil niṉṟum nirpāyum matakukaḷum vāykkālkaḷum Aṇaikaḷum kulaikaḷum Ivaiyiṟṟukku maṇ Eṭukka veṇṭum prāptikaḷum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum muṟkālaṅkaḷil ceytu potumpaṭikaḷile Iṉṉāḷ mutal peṟavum Iṉṉilattāl varuṅ kaṭamai kuṭimai tevai puṟavuṭal poṉvari
parum pāṭikāval Aḷavuvaṟkam kaḷḷar piṭiviṭṭup puṇaippārāyam taṟuttampu Oḻuku nirpāṭṭam veṭṭi taṉiyāḷ paṇikkottup pāṭikāval kūṟṟu Ilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭuilakkai viṭaipper mātappaṭi tirupputiyitu paccai tirukkāttikaippaccai paramaṇṭalac carakkup paṭṭiṉa vari ciṟuvari nāṭṭuviṉiyokam Uṟaināḻi koyiṟ tevai pañcupili Olai yeḻuttu viṉiyokam vācalvari viṉiyokam taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai ceṭṭiṟai taṭṭolipāṭṭam maṉaivari yiṉavari maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai puṉpayir kaṭamai Iruntu parimāṟuvārāyam Ilāñcaṉaippeṟuvaḻiccārikai Iṭaivari koyil vari nāṭṭukkaṇakku viṉiyokam vācaṟpaṇam maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Aṉaittāyavaṟkamum tavirntu patiṉmuṉ
vatu pacāṉamutal Iṟaiyiliyākap peṟṟum Itaṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku Ellāntalaiyāṉaperumāḷ cantikku Uṭalāka Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku Aiññūṟṟuk kalacceṉellu cuntarapāṇṭiya ccaturvvedimaṅkalattār Aḷakkum Ūriḷaṅkālāṟ tillaināyakaṉ perumpaṇṭāratte AṉantuRead aḷantu paṇṭārattār kaiccāttuk koṇṭu celavākkavum tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa vaiyiṟṟukkut tiruccūlaśāsanam paṇṇavum Ivvakaram nattamum nilaṅkaḷum nilaviḻukkāṭum Ūrnattaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum paṇṭu Uṭaiyāraiyum paḻaṅkāṇiyāḷaraiyum tavirttu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu pacāṉamutal nāyanārkkum Akarap peraḻivukkum grāma pariContinuation lost. In the inscription, on a different stone one line a below is seen •••• nāṭṭuppāmpūr nāṭṭu ••• karaṅkaḷukkum [bhu]dāṉaiṟaiyili ••• •••
Digital edition of SII 28.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
